script: 第一幕展示产品外观。第二幕展示核心功能。第三幕展示真实使用场景。最后呈现品牌和行动号召。

scenes.keyframe_prompt: Vertical cinematic advertising keyframe, one coherent scene, realistic lighting, clear subject, no embedded text, no watermark. Story beat: 第一幕展示产品外观。
scenes.video_prompt: Animate this keyframe into a polished short advertising shot. Preserve subject identity, product geometry, colors, and background continuity. Use one restrained camera movement and natural motion. Story beat: 第一幕展示产品外观。
scenes.negative_prompt: distorted product, extra limbs, warped hands, unreadable text, watermark, flicker, jump cut
